lesson.subtitle: Aula 5 -- Email Essentials -- Writing Polite Professional Emails
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Rafael de Andrade Brandão | Aula 5 -- Email Essentials

listenings.text: Hi Rafael, this is Diana from the conference last week. I am calling about a small request. Could you send me the sales report by email today? I would really like to read it before our meeting tomorrow. Please attach the file and add a clear subject line, so it is easy to find. If you are very busy this afternoon, would you forward it to my assistant instead? Her email address is in my last message. Thank you so much for your help. I am looking forward to your reply. Talk to you soon.

Hi Diana, this is Rafael. Thank you for your message this morning. I am writing the sales report right now, and I would like to send it this afternoon. I am finishing the last draft, and then I will reply to your email with the file. Could you check your inbox around three o'clock? I am also adding two new ideas for the project. If you have any questions, please call me back. I would be happy to explain everything. Thanks again, and have a great day. Talk to you soon.

extra_audio.text: Rafael opens his inbox early in the morning. He reads a polite request from a client. He writes a clear reply with a short subject line. He attaches the sales report to the email. Finally, he forwards a copy to his manager.
